creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
building latest x11/xscreensaver-gnome fails.

Fix: 

add "USE_GCC=4.3+" can avoid this trouble.
	i do not know why this trouble occurs. "internal compiler problem" is
	too hard...
	gcc42 cannot avoid this.
How-To-Repeat: 	/usr/local/include/GL/glu.h:287: warning: function declaration isn't a prototype
	surfaces.c: In function 'draw_surface':
	surfaces.c:652: internal compiler error: in assign_386_stack_local, at config/i386/i386.c:13484
	Please submit a full bug report,
	with preprocessed source if appropriate.
	See <URL:http://gcc.gnu.org/bugs.html> for instructions.
	gmake[1]: *** [surfaces.o] Error 1
	gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/local/work/usr/ports/x11/xscreensaver-gnome/work/xscreensaver-5.10/hacks/glx'
	gmake: *** [all] Error 5
	*** Error code 1
	
	Stop in /usr/ports/x11/xscreensaver-gnome.
	*** Error code 1
	
	Stop in /usr/ports/x11/xscreensaver-gnome.
